description: Zoning Verification — validates proposed use against zoning ordinance, checks setbacks, lot coverage, FAR, height limits, and parking requirements

hard_stops.label: Use Not Permitted in Zone
hard_stops.logic: Proposed use is not a permitted or conditional use in the current zoning district — requires rezoning or use variance

hard_stops.label: Setback Violation
hard_stops.logic: Proposed structure encroaches into required setback area — must obtain variance or redesign

hard_stops.label: Height Limit Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Proposed building height exceeds the maximum allowed in this zoning district — requires height variance or redesign

soft_flags.label: Parking Below Minimum
soft_flags.logic: Proposed parking count is below the minimum required — may need shared parking agreement or reduction request

soft_flags.label: Overlay District Applies
soft_flags.logic: Parcel is within a zoning overlay district (historic, floodplain, airport) — additional design standards may apply
